functions.name: Docker Node TypeScript build
functions.description: Build a TypeScript Node service in a multi-stage container.
functions.longDescription:
Build a TypeScript Node service in a multi-stage container.

Source : TypeScript 6.0 official documentation / official project documentation
functions.insertText:
FROM node:24-alpine AS build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

FROM node:24-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /app/dist ./dist
COPY --from=build /app/package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --omit=dev
CMD ["node", "dist/main.js"]

functions.name: systemd Node service
functions.description: Run a compiled TypeScript backend as a Linux service.
functions.longDescription:
Run a compiled TypeScript backend as a Linux service.

Source : TypeScript 6.0 official documentation / official project documentation
functions.insertText:
[Unit]
Description=Device TypeScript backend
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/opt/device-backend
ExecStart=/usr/bin/node /opt/device-backend/dist/main.js
Restart=on-failure
Environment=NODE_ENV=production

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
